issues.title: Support Positional Arguments for Issue IDs (L17)
issues.dod: All commands that target a single issue (show, claim, transition, link, etc.) support positional ID arguments; help text updated; existing --issue flag still works for backward compatibility.

issues.title: Update trls show, claim, and transition to support positional ID
issues.dod: trls show <id>, trls claim <id>, and trls transition <id> --to <status> all work without --issue flag.

issues.title: Update secondary single-issue commands to support positional ID
issues.scope: cmd/trellis/note.go, cmd/trellis/decision.go, cmd/trellis/amend.go, cmd/trellis/confirm.go, cmd/trellis/source_link.go, cmd/trellis/accept_citation.go, cmd/trellis/reopen.go, cmd/trellis/heartbeat.go
issues.dod: All single-issue targeting commands support positional IDs.

issues.title: Smart TTY Detection for Interactive Commands (L18)
issues.dod: Interactive commands (ready, dag-summary, stale-review) automatically default to non-interactive mode when stdout is not a TTY; no more hangs in agent environments.

issues.title: Implement TTY detection and update trls ready
issues.dod: trls ready defaults to --format agent when piped or run in non-TTY.

issues.title: Update dag-summary and stale-review for TTY detection
issues.dod: dag-summary and stale-review skip TUI and output summary when in non-TTY.

issues.title: Enhanced aggregated views for Story tracking (L19)
issues.dod: A single command provides an overview of a story's progress, including child statuses and outcomes.

issues.title: Add Story Board view to trls list
issues.dod: trls list --parent <id> includes Status, Outcome, and ClaimedBy columns in a table format.

issues.title: Improve Worker Skill for efficiency and reliability (L20, L21)
issues.dod: trls-worker skill updated with best practices for loop efficiency and large batch processing.

issues.title: Document bundled 'transition + commit' workflow in skill
issues.dod: Skill includes explicit recommendation for bundling trellis transition with git commit to avoid state lag.

issues.title: Add 'Batch Strategy' section to worker skill
issues.dod: Skill instructs agents on how to handle large tasks by building manifests and processing in chunks.
